value.rationale: Workflows in Google's Antigravity 2.0 are reusable, markdown-based sequences of steps stored and retrieved across sessions to guide the agent through repetitive tasks. This is a persistent memory mechanism (stored instructions/playbooks the agent reads across runs), making it a sub-feature of agent-memory. The closest existing parent is `google-antigravity-2-0-agent-memory-workflows`, which describes agent-generated workflows that can be saved for reuse — directly matching this offering.
